dashboard.label: // CONSOLE
dashboard.noAlbums: NO ALBUMS — ADD A STORAGE SOURCE TO START SCANNING

cronWarning.title: ⚠ Cron schedules empty
cronWarning.message: This Cloudflare Worker currently has no scheduled triggers. Podcast refresh, incremental scans, and stale-work reclaim won't run automatically. Open Settings → Cloudflare integration and click 'Ensure default cron' to restore the hourly cadence. As a short-term workaround, the Maintenance tools panel also has a manual reclaim button.
cronWarning.unconfiguredMessage: CF_API_TOKEN / CF_ACCOUNT_ID are not set, so the dashboard cannot read or modify the cron schedule. Existing features keep working, but you won't be able to recover the hourly cron after a redeploy without these credentials. Configure them in Settings → Cloudflare integration.

library.title: Library
library.noArtists: NO ARTISTS FOUND — ADD A STORAGE SOURCE FIRST
library.editHint: Changes update the library immediately and are written back into mp3/flac files on R2 and WebDAV sources.
library.noPlaylists: No playlists yet — create one first
library.songsHint: 💡 Hover song row to edit (✎) · Multi-select for batch edit
library.batchHint: Check rows to batch (edit tags / playlist / share)

tagEditor.hintSingle: Changes update the library immediately and are written back into mp3/flac files on R2 and WebDAV sources.
tagEditor.hintBatch: Only ticked fields are written; un-ticked fields stay as they are.
tagEditor.batchHint: Tick the ☐ on the left to apply that field to every selected track.
tagEditor.coverPlaceholder: Cover write-back will land in a later task

cover.dropHint: Drop or click to pick a cover (JPEG / PNG, auto-compressed to ≤500KB)
cover.errTooLarge: Cover still exceeds 500KB after compression ({kb} KB)

scrape.hint: Sources: {sources} (auto-proxied via the Worker when CORS blocks the browser).
scrape.allSourcesFailed: All sources failed — see source-specific errors above.
scrape.disabled: Metadata scraping is disabled in Settings.

files.label: // MANAGEMENT
files.title: File Browser
files.browserReadNothing: No browser-parseable files in this folder
files.pendingBadgeTitle: tag_scanned=0 instances from the incremental scan — press BROWSER READ to drain
files.editLookupFailed: Not yet in the library — run READ TAGS first
files.tidyEmpty: None of the selected files could be resolved (scan tags first)

transcoder.label: // MANAGEMENT
transcoder.title: Transcoder
transcoder.description: In-browser ffmpeg.wasm — files never leave your machine

player.selectSong: Select a song in the library

common.title: Common
common.languageDesc: Display language of the web console
common.apiUnavailable: Feature API unavailable — backend may not be deployed yet (getFeatures)

transcode.title: Transcoder
transcode.engineDesc: Backend that actually runs ffmpeg. Set to disabled to turn transcoding off entirely.
transcode.modeDesc: on_demand transcodes on /stream; pre_bake at upload; both combines.
transcode.profilesDesc: Targets used for pre-bake (pre_bake / both modes).

scrape.title: Metadata Scrape Sources
scrape.desc: Pick which external providers the editor's Scrape button queries, and in what order. Direct browser requests usually fail CORS; all sources route through the Worker proxy.

lastfm.title: Last.fm Proxy
lastfm.desc: Optional. Paste a Last.fm API key to enable getArtistInfo / getAlbumInfo / getSimilarSongs / getTopSongs. Leave empty and these endpoints return Subsonic error 30 (not supported) — the rest of the API stays available.
lastfm.label: API Key

scan.title: Scan Settings
scan.desc: WebDAV incremental scan cadence + browser-side metadata queue. The Cloudflare cron ticks hourly; intervals >1 are gated via KV cron:last_scan_ts.
scan.intervalHoursDesc: 0 = disabled; 1 = run every cron tick; N>1 = run every N hours.
scan.etagCheckDesc: Skip files whose (ETag + lastModified + size) triple matches the stored snapshot. Disable to force a full re-import on every scan.
scan.strategyDesc: auto: Worker handles mp3/flac/wav, others fall through to the browser; worker: Worker only; browser: always browser.
scan.browserAutoDesc: When Files page is visible, automatically run BROWSER READ on pending items. Each item costs one /rest/stream download — be careful on cellular.

crossOriginIsolation.title: Cross-Origin Isolation (COOP/COEP)
crossOriginIsolation.hint: Enables SharedArrayBuffer so the browser worker pool can run ffmpeg.wasm multi-thread. The Worker stamps Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy: same-origin, Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy: require-corp, Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy: same-origin on every response. May break cross-origin image embeds you have hand-wired — turn off as a quick rollback.
crossOriginIsolation.toggleDesc: Off restores pre-065 headers immediately; on takes effect on the next response (you may need to reload to flip crossOriginIsolated in this tab).

cf.title: Cloudflare Integration
cf.desc: Push the Cloudflare API token into Workers Secrets, manage cron schedules dynamically, and read 24h Worker analytics. Token never leaves CF's secret store. Requires super admin.
cf.tokenPlaceholder: Paste a token with Workers Scripts:Edit, Account Analytics:Read, Account Settings:Read
cf.saved: CF token saved — env will refresh on the next request
cf.cronHint: Replaces all Worker schedules. Leave empty to clear.
cf.ensureCronDesc: Re-applies the default hourly schedule (0 */1 * * *) when the live schedules list is empty. Leaves an existing custom cadence untouched.
cf.ensureCronWarning: wrangler deploy clears Worker schedules. After every deploy, click this to restore the default cron.

workerPool.title: Worker Pool
workerPool.desc: Logged-in users with write permission (level ≥ 2) can become a browser worker node: every 5 minutes the tab polls /edgesonic/work/poll and posts results back. Runs only while the tab is visible.
workerPool.participateDesc: Local toggle. When off, polling stops immediately. Task routing is decided by the server based on detected capabilities.
workerPool.ineligible: Your level cannot participate in the worker pool (requires level ≥ 2).
workerPool.backfillDesc: Replay every status=completed task_type=metadata row's result into song_masters / song_instances. Repairs historical tasks that completed but were never applied before fix 077. Idempotent.

maintenance.title: Maintenance tools
maintenance.desc: One-shot DB cleanup utilities, all idempotent and safe to re-run. Super-admin only.
maintenance.cleanupCoversDesc: For albums sharing the same cover_r2_key, keep the oldest id and clear the rest. R2 objects are NOT deleted; freed albums will re-resolve their own cover on next access (post-074 logic).
maintenance.reclaimDesc: Scans work_queue for claimed rows whose heartbeat is older than worker_claim_ttl_seconds: rows under max_attempts go back to 'queued', rows at the limit go to 'failed'. Mirrors the 052a scheduled sweep but runs on demand — especially handy when CF cron schedules are empty.
maintenance.reclaimHint: If CF cron is configured (Cloudflare integration → schedules non-empty), this button is normally unnecessary.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.desc: Active login sessions for this account
sessions.confirmRevoke: Revoke this session? You will be logged out if it is the current one.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.denied: ONLY SUPER ADMINS CAN MANAGE PERMISSIONS

clients.title: Subsonic Clients
clients.desc: Issue long-lived credentials for native Subsonic apps (DSub, Symfonium…). They can stream and browse, but can never touch files or admin.

sources.label: // MANAGEMENT
sources.title: Storage Sources
sources.rootPathHint: Optional — scan starts from this subdirectory, e.g. /music
sources.passwordPlaintextHint: Password is still in the legacy plaintext column. Push STORAGE_KEY and run "Migrate plaintext passwords".
sources.migrateHint: Bulk-encrypt every remaining legacy password under STORAGE_KEY. One-way.
sources.migrateConfirm: Encrypt every remaining plaintext password? This cannot be undone, and the legacy password column is blanked after each row is rewritten.

scanStatus.forceHint: Shift+click to force a full rescan

radio.title: Internet Radio
radio.empty: No stations — click "Add station" to get started
radio.name: Name
radio.homepageClearHint: Leave empty to clear the homepage
radio.requiredMissing: Name and stream URL are required

podcasts.refreshTriggered: Refresh triggered, list will update shortly
podcasts.empty: No subscriptions yet — click "Subscribe" to begin
podcasts.episodesEmpty: No episodes yet — waiting for RSS sync…
podcasts.downloadTriggered: Download started, status will update shortly
podcasts.confirmDeleteChannel: Delete channel "{title}"? All episodes will be removed.

shares.title: Shares
shares.empty: No shares yet — click "New share" to create one
shares.searchSongHint: Type a song title or artist…
shares.searchAlbumHint: Type an album name or artist…
shares.confirmDelete: Delete this share? The public URL will stop working immediately.

playlists.title: Playlists
playlists.empty: No playlists yet — click "New playlist" to create one

playlists.confirmDelete: Delete playlist "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
playlists.noSongs: This playlist has no tracks yet

update.title: Update available
